title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 700.025 - Alteration of unit with seal, prohibited when
text:
700.025.  Alteration of unit with seal, prohibited when. — No dealer, manufacturer or their representative shall alter or cause to be altered any new manufactured home or modular unit or used modular unit used for educational purposes to which a seal has been affixed, if such alteration or conversion causes the manufactured home or modular unit to be in violation of the code.
(L. 1973 H.B. 98 § 5, A.L. 1976 H.B. 1393, A.L. 1978 S.B. 739, A.L. 1982 S.B. 648, A.L. 1999 S.B. 19, A.L. 2001 S.B. 317)
